raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 compatibility required by the migration.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 11.
